The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn, Part 2 (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $292,914,737Details
International Box Office $537,400,000
Worldwide Box Office $830,314,737
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $80,191,966
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $23,201,476
Total $103,393,442
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Bella awakens transformed—she is now a mother and finally… a vampire. While her husband Edward delights in her beauty, speed, and uncommon self-control, newborn Bella has never felt more alive; and the destiny of her best friend Jacob Black has become entwined in that of their exceptional daughter Renesmee. The arrival of a creature so rare cements an extended family, but will soon ignite forces that threaten to destroy.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$141,067,634 (48.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.08 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:35.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$136,200,000 (worldwide box office is 6.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,070 opening theaters/4,070 max. theaters, 6.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $439,626,172

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 16th, 2012 (Wide) by Lionsgate
November 16th, 2012 (IMAX) by Lionsgate
International Releases: November 14th, 2012 (Wide) (Belgium)
November 14th, 2012 (Wide) (Italy)
November 14th, 2012 (Wide) (Switzerland)
November 14th, 2012 (Wide) (Sweden)
November 14th, 2012 (Wide) (France)
Video Release: March 2nd, 2013 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of violence including disturbing images, some sensuality and partial nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2243, 10/3/2012)
Running Time: 115 minutes
Franchise: Twilight
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Falsely Accused, Revenge, Vampire, Werewolf
Source material: Young Adult Book Adaptation
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Temple Hill Entertainment, Summit Entertainment, Sunswept Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Bella awakens transformed—she is now a mother and finally… a vampire. While her husband Edward delights in her beauty, speed, and uncommon self-control, newborn Bella has never felt more alive; and the destiny of her best friend Jacob Black has become entwined in that of their exceptional daughter Renesmee. The arrival of a creature so rare cements an extended family, but will soon ignite forces that threaten to destroy.
